name: Baby Black Ant
description: A harmless pet that represents your alliance with the black ant colony. Its value is both defensive and logistical.
behavior: It behaves like a docile pet: it follows its owner, can be petted, dressed, and assigned to a pet house.
interactionWithPlayer: It is tamed automatically when obtained, follows the player without slurry, and offers a 20-slot mobile inventory.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive and does not seek fights. Its main role is to accompany the player and provide utility outside direct combat.
strategy: It is the best of the three babies for dangerous exploration: its defensive bonus greatly softens mistakes as long as you keep the companion alive.
respawnInfo: If it dies, it can be recovered by returning to the Black Ant Queen as long as that route is still valid for the current save or NG+ cycle.

rewardUnlocks.name: Damage Resistance
rewardUnlocks.detail: +50% while the baby ant follows you outside its house.

specialTraits: It is obtained automatically by feeding the Black Ant Queen the correct yummy Gum Sandwich.
It grants +50% damage resistance while it is not stored in a pet house.
Unlike regular worker ants, it does not steal food from roasting spits, jerky racks, or storage.
